channel.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories
channel.description: Top stories in the U.S. and world news, politics, health, science, business, music, arts and culture. Nonprofit journalism with a mission. This is NPR.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

image.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories

item.title: Hurricanes use stifling defense to win the Stanley Cup
item.description: The Carolina Hurricanes held Vegas to five total goals in Games 4 and 5 and used a suffocating defense in a 3-0 shutout Sunday night in Game 6 to win their first championship in 20 years.
item.content:encoded:
The Carolina Hurricanes held Vegas to five total goals in Games 4 and 5 and used a suffocating defense in a 3-0 shutout Sunday night in Game 6 to win their first championship in 20 years.

(Image credit: Candice Ward/AP Photo)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Russian attack sets fire to religious site in Kyiv, kills 5 in Kharkiv
item.description: A large-scale Russian attack killed 5 rescuers in Kharkiv, wounded 20 in the capital Kyiv, set apartment buildings ablaze and sparked a fire at one of Ukraine's most significant religious landmarks.
item.content:encoded:
A large-scale Russian attack killed 5 rescuers in Kharkiv, wounded 20 in the capital Kyiv, set apartment buildings ablaze and sparked a fire at one of Ukraine's most significant religious landmarks.

(Image credit: Evgeniy Maloletka)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Crude oil futures drop after Trump promises an Iran deal will be signed Friday
item.description: Oil prices had already fallen quite dramatically on Thursday and Friday, in anticipation of an imminent deal. President Trump has posted online that the Strait of Hormuz will reopen after the deal is signed on Friday.
item.content:encoded:
Oil prices had already fallen quite dramatically on Thursday and Friday, in anticipation of an imminent deal. President Trump has posted online that the Strait of Hormuz will reopen after the deal is signed on Friday.

(Image credit: Majid Saeedi)
item.dc:creator: Camila Domonoske

item.title: Fate of historic slavery exhibit targeted by Trump hangs in the balance
item.description: A federal judge has temporarily blocked President Trump's order to remove some exhibits at national parks. One historic site targeted by that order faces an uncertain future.
item.content:encoded:
A federal judge has temporarily blocked President Trump's order to remove some exhibits at national parks. One historic site targeted by that order faces an uncertain future.

(Image credit: Adrian Florido)
item.dc:creator: Henry Larson

item.title: The U.S. and Iran announce a deal to end the war
item.description: President Trump said the U.S. would remove its blockade of the Strait of Hormuz and said a deal will be signed on Friday.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump said the U.S. would remove its blockade of the Strait of Hormuz and said a deal will be signed on Friday.

(Image credit: Samuel Corum)
item.dc:creator: Michael Levitt

item.title: Former Republican Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell hospitalized
item.description: A spokesman for former Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell said the Kentucky republican was admitted to a hospital on Sunday.
item.content:encoded:
A spokesman for former Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell said the Kentucky republican was admitted to a hospital on Sunday.

(Image credit: Heather Diehl)
item.dc:creator: Eric McDaniel

item.title: 12 dead after skydiving plane crashes in Missouri, authorities say
item.description: Authorities say a pilot and 11 others were killed when a plane taking people on a skydiving outing crashed and caught fire in Missouri.
item.content:encoded:
Authorities say a pilot and 11 others were killed when a plane taking people on a skydiving outing crashed and caught fire in Missouri.

(Image credit: Reed Hoffmann)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: The U.S.-led war in Iran will dominate Trump's G7 trip to France
item.description: The gathering was originally expected to be a meeting focused on a variety of separate economic and security issues.
item.content:encoded:
The gathering was originally expected to be a meeting focused on a variety of separate economic and security issues.

(Image credit: YOAN VALAT/POOL)
item.dc:creator: Franco Ordoñez

item.title: Worries over water as a giant data center moves into the New Mexico desert
item.description: Developers say there's plenty of water for a giant data center in southern New Mexico. Some locals are skeptical.
item.content:encoded:
Developers say there's plenty of water for a giant data center in southern New Mexico. Some locals are skeptical.

(Image credit: STACK Infrastructure)
item.dc:creator: John Burnett

item.title: Here's who's missing at the World Cup: Soccer-playing grannies!
item.description: The World Cup isn't the only global soccer event of note. Check out the Grannies International Football Tournament.
item.content:encoded:
The World Cup isn't the only global soccer event of note. Check out the Grannies International Football Tournament.

(Image credit: Samantha Reinders for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Ryan Lenora Brown
